Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed.
Step:3 Slowly lower your body by bending your knees and leaning back, keeping your torso upright.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as far as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize isolation control.

name: Chair Leg Extended Растяжка With Modified
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your quadriceps.
Step:4 Hold this position for 20-30 seconds. Focus on modified movement.
Step:5 Switch legs and repeat the stretch.

name: На Блоке Концентрированное Сгибание Tempo
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and rest your elbow against the inside of your thigh. Focus on tempo movement.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Intense Со Штангой Прямые Leg Становая Тяга
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at your hips and lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Lower the barbell until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings. Maintain intense form throughout.
Step:5 Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Precision Style В Рычажном Тренажёре В Наклоне Тяга With V-Bar
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Pull the v-bar towards your abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the weight back to the starting position. Emphasize precision control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: High Style Scapula Отжимания
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 As you lower, squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward. Focus on high movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Со Штангой Обратные На Скамье Скотта Сгибание Inclined
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended straight down, holding a barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Perform with inclined intensity.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: В Рычажном Тренажёре Обратные Grip На Скамье Скотта Сгибание With Precision
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended. Maintain precision form throughout.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Narrow Style С Эспандером Jack Knife Sit-Up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Step:2 Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, bringing your hands towards your feet.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on narrow movement.

name: Forward Выпады (Male) With Bench
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.
Step:2 Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position. Focus on bench movement.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Переменное Bear Crawl
instructions: Step:1 Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Step:2 Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged.
Step:3 Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot.
Step:4 Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 (alternating variation) Continue for the desired distance or time.

name: Одной Рукой Style На Блоке Стоя Скручивания (With Rope Attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Focus on single movement.
Step:3 Hold the rope with both hands and bring it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly crunch your torso forward, bringing your elbows towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Rough С Эспандером Push Sit-Up
instructions: Step:1 Attach the band securely to a stable anchor point.
Step:2 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold the band with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling. Focus on rough movement.
Step:4 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Fast Style Resistance С Эспандером Сидя Hip Abduction
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:3 Place your hands on the sides of the chair or bench for support.
Step:4 (fast variation) Engage your abductors (outer thigh muscles) and slowly push your knees apart, against the resistance of the band.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your knees back together.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Pure Подтягивания Обратным Хватом
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Emphasize pure control.
Step:3 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Light В Рычажном Тренажёре Стоя Chest Жим
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at chest level. Maintain light form throughout.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back towards your chest, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Resistance С Эспандером Сидя Shoulder Жим With Declined
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the resistance band with both hands, palms facing forward, and bring it up to shoulder level.
Step:3 Press the band overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to shoulder level. Emphasize declined control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Со Штангой Prone На Наклонной Скамье Сгибание With Intensive
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, allowing the barbell to hang down towards the floor.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:7 (intensive variation) Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:8 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Со Штангой Стоя Обратные Grip Сгибание Resistance
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the barbell as close to your shoulders as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on resistance movement.

name: Exercise Ball Hip Flexor Растяжка Pointed
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and kneel in front of it.
Step:2 Place your right foot on top of the stability ball, with your knee bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight.
Step:4 Lean forward, pushing your hips towards the stability ball, until you feel a stretch in your right hip flexor.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat. Emphasize pointed control.

name: Rough С Эспандером Hip Подъём
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place a resistance band just above your knees.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:4 Press your heels into the ground and lift your hips off the floor, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on rough movement.

name: Flexible Assisted Prone Hamstring
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a mat or bench with your legs fully extended.
Step:2 (flexible variation) Have a partner or use a resistance band to secure your ankles.
Step:3 Engage your hamstrings and lift your legs towards your glutes, keeping your knees straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: На Наклонной Скамье Отжимания (On Box) - Active Variation
instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the edge of a box or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the box by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 (active variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Со Штангой Bent Arm Pullover - Powerful Variation
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the barbell behind your head while keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on powerful movement.

name: Core Со Штангой Вертикальная Тяга V. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended. Perform with core intensity.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Гантелями Step Up Одной Рукой Leg Balance With Bicep Сгибание - Chair Variation
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Step:3 Engage your core and push through your right heel to lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left knee up towards your chest.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, perform a bicep curl by bending your elbows and bringing the dumbbells towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells back down and simultaneously lower your left foot back to the ground.
Step:6 (chair variation) Repeat the movement on the opposite side, stepping up with your left foot and curling the dumbbells.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Эспандером One Arm Стоя Low Тяга - Боковое Variation
instructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a stable anchor point at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the band with one hand, palm facing inward, and step back to create tension in the band.
Step:4 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Pull the band towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the band back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides. Emphasize lateral control.

name: Endurance Style One Arm Отжимания На Брусьях
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing away from a bench or chair, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place one hand on the bench or chair behind you, fingers pointing towards your body. Maintain endurance form throughout.
Step:3 Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench or chair.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.

name: На Блоке Боковое Bend Smooth
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with one hand.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Slowly bend sideways at the waist, lowering the cable handle towards your knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Focus on smooth movement.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Alternate sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Гантелями На Обратной Наклонной Шраги - Rigid Variation
instructions: Step:1 Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 (rigid variation) Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your arms fully extended towards the floor.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:5 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Pulse Style Walk Elliptical Cross Trainer
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings.
Step:2 Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly.
Step:3 Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body.
Step:4 Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise. Emphasize pulse control.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.

name: Balance На Блоке На Наклонной Скамье Сведение
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low position and attach the handles.
Step:2 Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the floor. Perform with balance intensity.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Cocoons With Mega
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize mega control.

name: На Блоке На Наклонной Скамье Bench Тяга - Elite Variation
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable handle to the low pulley.
Step:2 Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms fully in front of you. Perform with elite intensity.
Step:4 Lean forward from your hips while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the cable handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows.
Step:6 Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Flexible На Блоке Triceps Pushdown (V-Bar)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended. Perform with flexible intensity.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps.
Step:7 Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Advanced С Гантелями На Прямых Ногах Становая Тяга
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing a slight bend in your knees. Focus on advanced movement.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then squeeze your glutes and push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Hold Style С Гантелями Переменное Сидя Bicep Сгибание On Exercise Ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell while rotating your forearm until your palm is facing your shoulder.
Step:4 (hold variation) Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the curl with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating curls for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Active Style На Блоке Pushdown
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and push the bar down until your elbows are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position. Maintain active form throughout.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Stability Style С Эспандером Kneeling One Arm Pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head.
Step:2 Kneel down and hold the band with one hand, palm facing down.
Step:3 Extend your arm fully overhead, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:4 Engage your lat muscles and pull the band down towards your side, bringing your elbow towards your ribcage.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides. Perform with stability intensity.

name: Rounded Twisted Leg Подъём (Female)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, bringing them towards your chest. Emphasize rounded control.
Step:3 As you lift your legs, twist your hips to one side, bringing your knees towards your opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, this time twisting your hips to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Широким Хватом Chest Отжимания На Брусьях On High Parallel Bars - Low Variation
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself on the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air.
Step:2 Lean forward slightly and lower your body by bending your elbows until your chest is just above the bars.
Step:3 (low variation) Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: На Блоке One Arm На Наклонной Скамье Жим With Rigid
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position.
Step:2 Sit on an incline bench facing away from the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with one hand and bring it up to shoulder height. Emphasize rigid control.
Step:4 Position your feet firmly on the ground and maintain a stable position.
Step:5 Press the handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Exercise Ball Переменное Arm Ups With Fast
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift one arm up towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Perform with fast intensity.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Hanging Pike Weak
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground. Emphasize weak control.
Step:4 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: One Arm Against Wall Compressed
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one arm straight out in front of you and place your palm against the wall.
Step:3 Engage your core and lean your body forward, keeping your arm straight and your back flat. Maintain compressed form throughout.
Step:4 Slowly push against the wall with your palm, activating your lat muscles.
Step:5 Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and repeat with the other arm.

name: Ez Со Штангой На Обратной Наклонной Close Grip Face Жим - Mini Variation
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then press the barbell back up to the starting position. Emphasize mini control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Weighted One Hand Pull Up Fast
instructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 (fast variation) Lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: На Наклонной Скамье Push Up Depth Jump With Complex
instructions: Step:1 Find an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, and place your hands shoulder-width apart on the edge.
Step:2 Step your feet back, keeping your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the edge of the surface, bending your elbows and keeping your body aligned. Maintain complex form throughout.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Jump off the edge of the surface, landing softly with your knees slightly bent.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up and depth jump for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Pointed На Блоке Palm Rotational Тяга
instructions: Step:1 Attach a handle to a cable machine at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Step back to create tension on the cable, keeping your back straight and knees slightly bent. Emphasize pointed control.
Step:5 Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your palms to face upwards as you do so.
Step:6 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Intermediate Style С Гантелями На Скамье Скотта Сгибание Over Exercise Ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your elbow on the exercise ball.
Step:3 (intermediate variation) Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Iron Cross Растяжка - Deep Variation
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:2 Raise your legs up towards the ceiling, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the floor with your feet.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return your legs to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the stretch on the other side. Maintain deep form throughout.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: All Fours Squad Растяжка - Elevated Variation
instructions: Step:1 Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Step:2 Extend one leg straight back, keeping your knee bent and your foot flexed. Maintain elevated form throughout.
Step:3 Slowly lower your hips towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your quads.
Step:4 Hold this position for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Switch legs and repeat the stretch on the other side.

name: Isolation Assisted Сидя Pectoralis Major Растяжка With Stability Ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a stability ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Slowly lower the stability ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your pectoral muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Emphasize isolation control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: One Leg Приседания - Expanded Variation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one leg forward, keeping it off the ground.
Step:3 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Step:5 Push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other leg. Maintain expanded form throughout.

name: Targeted Style В Машине Смита Узким Хватом Bench Жим
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Focus on targeted movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Гантелями One Arm Prone Молотковым Хватом Сгибание - Macro Variation
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms. Focus on macro movement.

name: Отжимания (Wall) With Static
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back a few feet, keeping your body straight and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:4 (static variation) Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:5 Push back up to the starting position, straightening your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Fierce Style Forward Выпады (Male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.
Step:2 Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position.
Step:5 (fierce variation) Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Подтягивания Обратным Хватом Diagonal
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:3 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 (diagonal variation) Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: На Блоке Judo Flip With Static
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands at chest level, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your core and rotate your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body.
Step:4 As you rotate, pivot your back foot and allow your hips to rotate naturally. Emphasize static control.
Step:5 Extend your arms fully and finish the movement by flipping the cable handle over your shoulder.
Step:6 Return to the starting position by reversing the movement, rotating your torso back to the center.
Step:7 Repeat the movement on the opposite side.
Step:8 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Гантелями Over Bench One Arm Wrist Сгибание - Strength Variation
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Maintain strength form throughout.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: Лёжа Leg-Hip Подъём - Contracted Variation
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, raising them towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Emphasize contracted control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Prone Medicine Ball Close Grip Push Up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 Push back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain prone form throughout.

name: Triceps Отжимания На Брусьях (Between Benches) - Extreme Variation
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge of the bench, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 (extreme variation) Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Micro Style Со Штангой Speed Приседания
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips back and down, as if sitting into a chair.
Step:4 (micro variation) Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Rough На Блоке На Обратной Наклонной Сведение
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the handles with your palms facing forward and your arms extended straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion. Perform with rough intensity.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Stability В Рычажном Тренажёре Narrow Grip Сидя Тяга
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to ensure proper form.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position. Focus on stability movement.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Twisted Side-To-Side Chin
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed.
Step:4 Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight.
Step:5 Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Perform with twisted intensity.

name: Prone С Гантелями Вертикальная Shoulder External Вращения
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Emphasize prone control.
Step:3 Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Controlled Wrist Rollerer
instructions: Step:1 Attach a weight to one end of a rope or bar.
Step:2 Hold the other end of the rope or bar with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:3 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms fully extended in front of you.
Step:4 Slowly roll the weight up towards your hands by flexing your wrists.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position. Perform with controlled intensity.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Со Штангой На Наклонной Скамье Bench Жим Сидя
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 (seated variation) Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Со Штангой Sitted Alternate Leg Подъём (Female) With Intermediate
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs.
Step:2 (intermediate variation) Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping it parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Lower the leg back down and repeat with the other leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Отжимания To Боковое Планка - Athletic Variation
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 Push back up to the starting position. Emphasize athletic control.
Step:4 Shift your weight onto your left hand and rotate your body to the right, lifting your right arm towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Hold the side plank position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up and side plank on the opposite side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Гантелями Сидя One Leg Calf Подъём - Молотковым Хватом Grip Deep
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place one foot on a raised surface, such as a step or block, with your heel hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with a hammer grip, meaning your palms are facing each other and your fingers are wrapped around the handle.
Step:4 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 (deep variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

name: Gentle Style На Блоке Pulldown (Pro Lat Bar)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your thighs are parallel to the ground and your feet are flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the lat bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit down and lean back slightly, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Maintain gentle form throughout.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Inverted Style Inverse Leg Сгибание (On Подтягивания На Блоке Machine)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle straps are at the lowest setting.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your legs extended and the ankle straps attached to your feet.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability.
Step:4 Bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstrings.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain inverted form throughout.

name: Со Штангой High Bar Приседания Core
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Place the barbell on your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to squat down, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Perform with core intensity.
Step:4 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Sharp Style С Гантелями Сумо Pull Through
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointed outwards.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your hips down into a squat position, keeping your back straight. Focus on sharp movement.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell down between your legs, keeping your arms straight.
Step:5 Drive through your heels and extend your hips forward, pulling the dumbbell up and in front of your body.
Step:6 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbell back down between your legs.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Rough На Блоке Стоя One Arm Triceps Разгибание
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position. Focus on rough movement.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform the exercise with your left arm.

name: Assisted Стоя Подтягивания Обратным Хватом With Focused
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired assistance level.
Step:2 (focused variation) Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and shoulders back, engage your core, and slightly bend your knees.
Step:4 Pull your body up by flexing your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your sides.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Одной Рукой В Машине Смита Shoulder Жим
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 (single variation) Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the bar off the rack and position it at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the bar upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Complete Style Ez Bar Лёжа Close Grip Triceps Разгибание Behind Head
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing up, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Maintain complete form throughout.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: В Машине Смита One Arm Тяга Linear
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to waist level.
Step:2 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Emphasize linear control.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with one hand using an overhand grip, with your palm facing down.
Step:5 Keep your elbow close to your body and pull the bar towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: Assisted Подтягивания Inclined
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Step:4 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain inclined form throughout.

name: На Блоке Сидя Тяга With Обратные
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your shoulders relaxed.
Step:3 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Focus on reverse movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Гантелями Молотковым Хватом Сгибание With Traditional
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions. Focus on traditional movement.

name: В Машине Смита Machine На Наклонной Скамье Tricep Разгибание - Прямые Variation
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder height.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, lifting the bar off the rack and holding it directly above your chest. Focus on straight movement.
Step:5 Lower the bar slowly towards your forehead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Отжимания On Нижнее Arms - Resistance Variation
instructions: Step:1 Start in a plank position with your forearms on the ground and elbows directly below your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body. Emphasize resistance control.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Sled 45В° Leg Wide Жим - Blunt Variation
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the foot platform.
Step:3 Position your feet wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push against the foot platform to extend your legs and straighten your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bend your knees to return to the starting position. Maintain blunt form throughout.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Гантелями Выпады With Firm
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lower your body. Maintain firm form throughout.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Improved Sphinx
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the ground with your forearms flat on the floor, elbows directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your chest off the ground, keeping your forearms and toes on the floor.
Step:3 Hold this position for a few seconds, making sure to keep your neck in a neutral position.
Step:4 Slowly lower your chest back down to the starting position. Emphasize improved control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Эспандером Сидя Twist Pure
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your back straight.
Step:2 Wrap the band around your waist and hold the ends with both hands.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight and your feet on the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 (pure variation) Repeat the twist to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Walk Elliptical Cross Trainer - Expanded Variation
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings.
Step:2 Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly.
Step:3 Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body.
Step:4 Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion. Emphasize expanded control.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.

name: В Машине Смита Bent Over Тяга With Declined
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Perform with declined intensity.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Гантелями На Наклонной Скамье One Arm Жим On Exercise Ball With Extended
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Perform with extended intensity.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: Athletic Style Battling Ropes
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold one end of the rope in each hand, with your palms facing each other.
Step:3 Raise your arms to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 (athletic variation) Begin making alternating waves with the ropes by rapidly raising and lowering each arm.
Step:5 Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

name: С Гантелями Обратные Grip Тяга (Female) Hold
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing your body. Perform with hold intensity.
Step:3 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Let your arms hang straight down, fully extended, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: В Рычажном Тренажёре Narrow Grip Сидя Тяга - Strength Variation
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to ensure proper form.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement. Maintain strength form throughout.
Step:7 Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Traditional Со Штангой Romanian Становая Тяга
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body.
Step:5 Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the barbell.
Step:6 Once you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, push your hips forward and stand up straight.
Step:7 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:8 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on traditional movement.

name: Exercise Ball One Leg Prone Нижнее Body Вращения Fierce
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles to stabilize your body.
Step:4 Slowly lift one leg off the ground, keeping it straight and parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Rotate your leg outward, away from your body, while keeping your hips and upper body stable.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return your leg to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the rotation with the other leg. Focus on fierce movement.
Step:8 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Гирей Arnold Жим - Beginner Variation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing towards you.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, rotating your palms to face forward as you extend your arms. Emphasize beginner control.
Step:3 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Fluid С Гантелями Запрыгивания Выпады
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is on the surface.
Step:3 Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left foot up as well.
Step:4 (fluid variation) Once both feet are on the step, lower your left foot back down to the starting position, keeping your right foot on the step.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, alternating which foot you step up with each time.
Step:6 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Quads Complex
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back as if sitting on a chair.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Step:4 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Push through your heels to return to the starting position. Emphasize complex control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: В Рычажном Тренажёре Assisted Подтягивания Обратным Хватом With Twisted
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to your desired resistance level.
Step:2 Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your body straight.
Step:4 (twisted variation) Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, leading with your chest.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Push Up On На Bosu-Мяче With Improved
instructions: Step:1 Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up.
Step:2 Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows. Focus on improved movement.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dynamic Style Со Штангой Лёжа Back Of The Head Tricep Разгибание
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Maintain dynamic form throughout.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Deep В Машине Смита Machine Обратные На Обратной Наклонной Close Grip Bench Жим
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Focus on deep movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Hanging Прямые Leg Подъём With Elevated
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go. Maintain elevated form throughout.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Вертикальная В Машине Смита На Наклонной Скамье Bench Жим
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 30-45 degree incline.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back flat against the pad and feet firmly on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Perform with upright intensity.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows slightly tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Extended Style Inverted Тяга
instructions: Step:1 Set up a bar at waist height or use a suspension trainer.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grab the bar or handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground.
Step:5 Pull your chest towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Perform with extended intensity.

name: С Гантелями One Arm Сведение On Exercise Ball Improved
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your upper back is resting on the exercise ball.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inwards.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms. Focus on improved movement.

name: Hanging Прямые Twisting Leg Hip Подъём With Compound
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards your chest, keeping them straight. Perform with compound intensity.
Step:3 Once your legs are parallel to the ground, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards that side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, but this time twist your hips to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Fast С Эспандером Прямые Leg Становая Тяга
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your feet.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands, palms facing your body, and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Engage your core and maintain a slight bend in your knees.
Step:4 Slowly hinge forward at your hips, keeping your back straight and chest lifted.
Step:5 Lower the band towards the ground while keeping your legs straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Perform with fast intensity.

name: На Блоке Боковое Pulldown (With Rope Attachment) Core
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope attachment to the cable machine at a high position.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly back.
Step:5 Pull the rope down towards your sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Emphasize core control.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the tension and allow the rope to return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Гантелями Around Pullover - Intensive Variation
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet firmly on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest. Perform with intensive intensity.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc motion.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Sit-Up With Arms On Chest With Mini
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Cross your arms over your chest.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Maintain mini form throughout.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Squared Обратные Grip Machine Lat Pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Maintain squared form throughout.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Targeted Style Одной Рукой Leg Calf Подъём (On A Dumbbell)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles. Emphasize targeted control.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

name: Chest And Фронтальное Of Shoulder Растяжка Micro
instructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height.
Step:3 Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm on top of your left arm.
Step:4 Interlace your fingers and press your palms together.
Step:5 Gently squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your hands forward, feeling a stretch in your chest and front of your shoulders.
Step:6 (micro variation) Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Гирей Сидя Жим With High
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms. Focus on high movement.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Со Штангой Приседания (On Knees) With Pure
instructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Place a barbell across your shoulders, gripping it with an overhand grip and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you slowly lower your body down by bending your knees, keeping your back straight. Perform with pure intensity.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Tough На Блоке One Arm Боковое Подъём
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Step:3 Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position. Focus on tough movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Kipping Muscle Up With Triple
instructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and use a swinging motion to generate momentum.
Step:3 As you swing forward, pull your chest towards the bar, using your lats and biceps to initiate the movement. Emphasize triple control.
Step:4 Continue the upward motion until your chest reaches the bar, then transition into a dip position by pushing down on the bar and extending your arms.
Step:5 Lower yourself back down to the starting position by bending your arms and controlling the descent.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Intermediate Style Kneeling Планка Tap Shoulder (Male)
instructions: Step:1 Start in a kneeling position with your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on your toes, and lift your body into a plank position.
Step:3 (intermediate variation) Keeping your core engaged and your hips stable, lift one hand off the ground and tap the opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Return the hand to the ground and repeat with the other hand.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Intensified Style С Гирей Extended Range One Arm Жим On С Пола
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight.
Step:4 Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm. Perform with intensified intensity.

name: Supine Style С Эспандером Переменное V-Up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Step:2 Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Step:3 As you lower your legs and upper body back down, switch the position of your legs, crossing one over the other. Focus on supine movement.
Step:4 Repeat the movement, alternating the position of your legs with each repetition.
Step:5 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Assisted Стоя Triceps Разгибание (With Towel) With Horizontal
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a towel with both hands behind your head.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your ears and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 (horizontal variation) Slowly extend your forearms upward, squeezing your triceps at the top.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the towel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Wall Style С Гантелями One Arm French Жим On Exercise Ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Focus on wall movement.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow stationary.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Side-To-Side Chin With Обратные
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed.
Step:4 Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight. Perform with reverse intensity.
Step:5 Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Macro Style Узким Хватом Отжимания
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Maintain macro form throughout.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Gentle Prone Twist On Stability Ball
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on a stability ball with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes touching the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Rotate your torso to one side, bringing your shoulder towards your hip. Keep your hips and legs stable throughout the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 (gentle variation) Repeat the rotation to the other side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: На Блоке Rope На Наклонной Скамье Tricep Разгибание - Обратные Variation
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the incline bench to a comfortable angle.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the pulley with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead.
Step:4 (reverse variation) Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows until your forearms touch your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: На Блоке Приседания Тяга (With Rope Attachment) Heavy
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 (heavy variation) Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, with your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Keep your elbows close to your body and continue pulling until your hands reach your chest.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the rope and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: С Эспандером Vertical Pallof Жим - Сидя Variation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and wrap the band around a sturdy object at chest height.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands and step away from the anchor point, creating tension in the band.
Step:3 Position yourself perpendicular to the anchor point, with your side facing the band.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your hands at chest height.
Step:5 Engage your core and press the band away from your chest, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly bring the band back towards your chest.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides. Perform with seated intensity.

name: Со Штангой Обратные Wrist Сгибание - Prone Variation
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your body. Emphasize prone control.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Firm Style Hanging Oblique Knee Подъём
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize firm control.

name: Horizontal С Гантелями Стоя Alternate Над Головой Жим
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 (horizontal variation) Press one dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
